title: Eat, Drink & Play Squash Women’s Event
excerpt: The Edmonton Squash Club will be hosting a women’s drop-in on Saturday, November 25th from 3-6 PM followed by drinks and dinner. The cost is $25 for members and $35 for non-members which includes 2 drink tickets and dinner. Juniors are $10 (includes dinner). For further information please see https://edmontonsquashclub.ca/event/womens-drop-in-12/
content:
The Edmonton Squash Club will be hosting a women’s drop-in on Saturday, November 25th from 3-6 PM followed by drinks and dinner.

The cost is $25 for members and $35 for non-members which includes 2 drink tickets and dinner. Juniors are $10 (includes dinner).

For further information please see https://edmontonsquashclub.ca/event/womens-drop-in-12/
